meta.index_title: CumulusVPN — Decentralized VPN on Flux Cloud
meta.index_desc: One-tap private VPN on the Flux network. No accounts, no logs, no email. Free forever at 100 KB/s — full speed for $0.99/month, paid in FLUX from your own wallet.
meta.index_social_title: CumulusVPN — Private internet, no account, no logs.
meta.index_social_desc: Decentralized VPN on Flux Cloud. Powered by RunOnFlux. Free at 100 KB/s, full speed for $0.99/month in FLUX.
meta.jsonld_offer_free: Free forever at 100 KB/s. No account, no email.
meta.jsonld_offer_premium: Full speed, per month, paid in FLUX from your own wallet.

shared.footer_disclaimer_index: Decentralized VPN on Flux Cloud · cumulusvpn.com. CumulusVPN is an independent project built on Flux infrastructure; not affiliated with the makers of WireGuard. WireGuard is a registered trademark of Jason A. Donenfeld. FLUX price shown (~$0.99) is approximate and moves with the market. Availability may be restricted where VPNs are unlawful. POC preview — figures illustrative pending mainnet launch.

index.hero_h1:
Private internet,
no account, no logs.
index.hero_lede:
One tap connects you through datacenter nodes in dozens of countries.
        Free at 100 KB/s forever. Full speed for $0.99/month — paid in FLUX, straight from
        your wallet. No email, no card, no company that can hand over what it never had.
index.how_h2: No accounts. No server of ours. Just the chain.
index.how_lede:
Your WireGuard key is your identity. Payment is a fact on the Flux blockchain that every
        gateway reads independently. If our company vanished tomorrow, the deployed gateways keep running.
index.step1_p:
The app makes a WireGuard keypair on your device and enrolls it at the nearest datacenter
          gateway. Free tier is throttled to 100 KB/s server-side — connected in seconds, no signup.
index.step2_p:
Send 20 FLUX (~$0.99) to the payment address with your key's code in the transaction
          message. One tap opens your wallet with it pre-filled.
index.step3_p:
Every gateway scans the chain and flips your key to full speed within ~1 minute — on all
          servers at once, for 30 days. No activation, no login. Prepay to stack months.
index.pricing_h2: Free that actually works. Cheap when you need more.
index.pricing_lede:
The free tier is funded by subscribers and capped so it can't be abused — genuinely usable
        for browsing and messaging. Full speed is one wallet transfer away.
index.free_li3: No logs, no email, no signup
index.prem_li1: Full speed — up to 50 Mbit/s per device
index.prem_li2: Unlocks on all gateways at once
index.prem_li3: Pay from any FLUX wallet, prepay months
index.prem_li4: Still no account — no logs, no email, nothing stored
index.apps_h2: One connect button, on every screen you own.
index.apps_lede:
The same beautiful client on web, desktop and mobile — sharing one design language and one
        key. Pay on web or desktop; your phone unlocks automatically over the chain within a minute.
index.app_web_p:
Generates your key in the browser and gives you a WireGuard config + QR to import into the
          WireGuard app. Also hosts the pay-in-FLUX upgrade page. No install to set up or pay.
index.app_desktop_p:
A calm menu-bar app for macOS, Windows and Linux. Kill switch, auto-reconnect and gateway
          failover run quietly in the tray. Signed ~10 MB installers.
index.app_mobile_p:
iOS and Android, connect-only and store-compliant. Upgrade on the web and your phone flips
          to full speed on its own — no in-app billing, no lock-in.
index.trust_h2: We can't hand over what we never had.
index.trust_lede:
Most VPNs ask you to trust a no-logs promise. CumulusVPN removes the thing you'd have to
        trust: there's no account to log, no database of users, and no central server that owns the fleet.
index.trust1_p:
Gateways enforce tier per key and route traffic — nothing about who or what you browse is
          stored. DNS runs through the tunnel to the gateway's own resolver.
index.trust2_p:
No email, no password, no card. Your WireGuard key is your only identity, and payment is
          an anonymous FLUX transfer tied to a hash — not to you.
index.trust3_p:
The apps and the gateway are public. Read the code, build it yourself, or run your own —
          the payment and entitlement protocol is fully documented.
index.trust4_p:
Exits run on Flux datacenter infrastructure — not a residential botnet. Stable IPs, real
          bandwidth, over 6,500 nodes across the network.
index.trust5_p:
Clients discover live gateways from the Flux network itself, with a signed bundled
          fallback. No single point to seize, block, or switch off.
index.trust6_p:
Modern, audited, fast. You never touch a config file — the app handles keys, tunnels and
          failover. WireGuard is the wire; the experience is one button.
index.band_p:
Start free in seconds — no email, no card. Upgrade with one FLUX transfer whenever you want
        full speed, and your $0.99 literally buys the network's own compute.
